comment:
Many people have difficulty deciding what presents to choose and I am therefore currently working on an important project to find out what presents people in Zetland like giving most, in the hope of helping people choose the right gift. I have found some useful statistics for my project in the form of a bar chart, to help give my opinion on the subject.
The information in the bar chart shows the popularity of each gift. While electronic gifts (35%) are the most popular, handmade gifts (2%) are the least. Clothing and accessories (34%) rank just below electronic gifts and roughly a third either like giving boxes of chocolates(19%) or home décor items (10%).
The bar chart shows a significant difference in what presents people like giving. Electronic gifts are a great deal more popular than handmade gifts, having a 35% popularity rating, against 2%. As noted earlier, electronic gifts barely eclipse clothing and accessories, with 34% of people giving that kind of present.
The statistics point to an underlying problem. As electronic gifts are the most popular, it is clear that the present will cost a lot. This can make giving an expensive present a less enjoyable experience because the receiver may feel embarrassed. However, this problem can be solved if people create a budget to limit how much family and friends can spend on presents.
In conclusion, I believe giving and getting presents plays an important role in our lives because exchanging gifts shows how much people appreciate love one another. If people are mindful of the budget, it is a very pleasant experience.

exam_topic.title: Развёрнутое письменное высказывание на основе таблицы или графика
